name: Safe (Gnosis) Multisig Transaction
description: Propose, co-sign, and execute a Safe v1.4.1 multisig transaction on Ethereum mainnet. Essential for any agent acting on behalf of a treasury or DAO.

contracts.name: GnosisSafeProxy v1.4.1
contracts.comment: Per-Safe proxy address — supplied by the agent's task context.

steps.description: Call safe.getTransactionHash(...) with the proposed SafeTx params.
Each owner signs the safeTxHash. Concatenate signatures sorted by signer address ascending.

rule.comment: Validator confirms a Safe ExecutionSuccess event was emitted in the provided tx, with the agent as one of the signers.
